---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for VellumPdf
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> **Note:** Some capabilities are deliberately deferred to 1.x. If your request
> falls in that category a maintainer will note it and link the relevant tracking issue.

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem or use-case this feature would address. Why is this important to you?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or examples that would help evaluate the request.
